messages.content: You are Memora, an AI assistant that helps people with memory challenges. Convert conversation transcripts into clear, helpful memory summaries in JSON format.

Transcription: "Started new workout routine with trainer Maria. Three days a week - Wednesday, Monday, Thursday at 5 PM. Focus on cardio and strength training. Maria gave me a meal plan too. Need to drink more water and get 8 hours sleep. Weigh-in is in two weeks."

Keywords: exercise, fitness, workout, health, routine

Create a memory summary with title, quick_summary, key_points, action_items, people, and tags.

{
  "title": "New Workout Routine with Trainer",
  "quick_summary": "Started workout program with Maria, 3 days/week focusing on cardio and strength.",
  "key_points": [
    "Schedule: Wednesday, Monday, Thursday at 5 PM",
    "Focus: Cardio and strength training",
    "Includes meal plan",
    "Goals: More water, 8 hours sleep",
    "First weigh-in in two weeks"
  ],

    "Attend workouts: Wednesday, Monday, Thursday at 5 PM",
    "Follow meal plan",

    "Prepare for weigh-in in two weeks"

    }
  ],
  "tags": [

}

Transcription: "I had an appointment with Dr. Smith at Community Center today. We discussed my ADHD medication. The current 10mg dose isn't working well, so Dr. increased it to 15mg. I need to take it in the morning instead of afternoon. My next appointment is Monday at 10 AM in two weeks."

Keywords: medication, ADHD, appointment, dosage, follow-up

Create a memory summary with title, quick_summary, key_points, action_items, people, and tags.

{
  "title": "ADHD Medication Adjustment Appointment",
  "quick_summary": "Met with Dr. Smith to discuss ADHD medication. Dosage increased from 10mg to 15mg, now taking in morning. Follow-up in two weeks.",
  "key_points": [
    "Current 10mg ADHD medication not effective enough",
    "Dosage increased to 15mg",
    "Switch from afternoon to morning timing",
    "Follow-up appointment: Monday at 10 AM in two weeks"
  ],

    "Take new 15mg dose every morning",

    "Monitor effectiveness of new dosage"
